description: Agent to help interact with enterprise data.

Date.description: The date when the email is sent.

HistoryId.description: The history id of the email.

Headers.description: A list of headers of the email.

RawMessage.description: The entire email message in an RFC 2822 formatted and base64url encoded string. Only returned when MessageFormat=raw.

Size.description: The size in bytes of the email.

ThreadId.description: The thread id of the email.

AttachmentIds.description: A comma separated value of the ids of all attachments in the email.

To.description: The address where the email is sent to.

Labels.description: A comma separated value of labels that the email is part of.

BCC.description: The primary email address of the user. Writeable on create only. On update, a secondary email is added.

From.description: The address where the email is from.

CC.description: The primary email address of the user. Writeable on create only. On update, a secondary email is added.

Id.description: The Id of the message.Automatically assigned when the mail is created.

agentNode.instruction:
```
**Input:**


```

${gemini_agent_4.output}

\*\*Summarize:\*\*

\\- How many documents received

\\- List all the documents

\*\*Validation:\*\*

\\- Check existence of the required and optional documents.

Required all:

1. Application for Issuance of Documentary Credit

2. Attachment Sheet

Optional, but at least one of these

1. Proforma Invoice (PI)

2. Purchase Order (PO)

3. Sales Contract (SC)

Optional:

1. Trust Receipt Form (TR)

2. Quotation

\*\*Output:\*\*
{"validation":Yes/No, "reasons":""}

\### Objective Your task is to analyze the email contents it's is all about submit application for Trade Finance or Approve email for Trade Finance requested.

\## Input : Read from ${when_an_email_is_received.Content}

\### Extraction Rules

1\. If ${when_an_email_is_received.AttachmentIds} and ${when_an_email_is_received.AttachmentPath} is NULL or blank. and have some word in ${when_an_email_is_received.Content} have {"APPROVE", "APPROVED", "approve","approved"} or related. Then OUTPUT mail_type" = "APPROVE"

2\. if ${when_an_email_is_received.AttachmentIds} and ${when_an_email_is_received.AttachmentPath} is NOT NULL, OUTPUT "mail_type" = "SUBMIT"

\### OUTPUT extract ${when_an_email_is_received.Content} and push as an output list.

{\
"1_applicant_party_code_app",

"2_applicant_address",

"3_beneficiary_party_code_bne",

"4_beneficiary_name",

"5_beneficiary_address",

"6_advising_bank_adv",

"7_advising_through_bank_adt_id",

"8_advising_through_bank_name",

"9_advising_through_bank_address",

"10_reimbursing_bank_rmb",

"11_limit_credit_line",

"12_currency",

"14_amount_terms_tolerance",

"16_quantity_vary_percent",

"17_effective_date",

"21_expiry_place",

"22_confirm_status",

"23_transferable",

"25_tenor_days",

"34_transhipment_43T",

"35_place_of_taking_in_charge_44A",

"36_port_of_loading_44E",

"37_port_of_discharge_44F",

"46_all_bank_charges_01W12"\
}

\\\*\\\*Role:\\\*\\\*

You are an expert Trade Finance Operations Specialist and SWIFT Messaging System Architect.

\\\*\\\*Objective:\\\*\\\*

Your task is to analyze the provided Letter of Credit (LC/DLC) document text, extract the relevant trade data, and format it STRICTLY as a standard SWIFT MT700 message. Generate the results for the mt700_message output parameter

\\\*\\\*Input:\\\*\\\*

"1_applicant_party_code_app",

"2_applicant_address",

"3_beneficiary_party_code_bne",

"4_beneficiary_name",

"5_beneficiary_address",

"6_advising_bank_adv",

"7_advising_through_bank_adt_id",

"8_advising_through_bank_name",

"9_advising_through_bank_address",

"10_reimbursing_bank_rmb",

"11_limit_credit_line",

"12_currency",

"13_lc_amount",

"14_amount_terms_tolerance",

"15_plus_minus_percent",

"16_quantity_vary_percent",

"17_effective_date",

"18_expiry_date",

"19_country",

"20_expiry_country",

"21_expiry_place",

"22_confirm_status",

"23_transferable",

"24_tenor_data_type",

"25_tenor_days",

"26_draft_start_event",

"27_due_date",

"28_available_with",

"29_settlement_method",

"30_draft_drawn_on",

"31_incoterms",

"32_transportation_type",

"33_partial_shipment_43P",

"34_transhipment_43T",

"35_place_of_taking_in_charge_44A",

"36_port_of_loading_44E",

"37_port_of_discharge_44F",

"38_place_of_final_destination_44B",

"39_latest_shipment_date",

"40_goods_description_gdesc",

"41_required_documents_01W08",

"42_additional_conditions_01W11",

"43_period_for_presentation_days",

"44_confirm_charges_paid_by",

"45_reimb_bank_charges_paid_by",

"46_all_bank_charges_01W12",

**\*\*Strict SWIFT Formatting Rules (CRITICAL):\*\***

1\. **\*\*Date Format:\*\*** All dates MUST be converted to the \`YYMMDD\` format (e.g., November 21, 2026 becomes \`261121\`).

2\. **\*\*Amount Format:\*\*** Amounts must follow the format \`\[3-letter Currency Code\]\[Amount using a comma as the decimal separator without thousand separators\]\` (e.g., USD 190,800.00 becomes \`USD190800,00\`).

3\. **\*\*Character Limits & Wrapping:\*\*** Free text fields (Tags 45A, 46A, 47A) MUST NOT exceed 65 characters per line. You must insert a carriage return / line break before the 65th character. Do not break words in half. Max 100 lines per tag.

4\. **\*\*Allowed Characters:\*\*** Only use the standard SWIFT character set (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, and standard punctuation: / - ? : ( ) . , ' +). Strip any unsupported special characters.

5\. **\*\*Missing Data:\*\*** If a JSON field is \`null\` or missing, omit it. If all fields for a non-mandatory SWIFT tag are \`null\`, omit the entire tag. Do not write "null", "N/A", or "Not provided" in the output.

6\. **\*\*No Conversational Text:\*\*** Output ONLY the raw MT700 message. Do not include introductory text, explanations, or markdown blocks.

**\*\*Data Mapping Instructions (JSON Field to MT700 Tag):\*\***

\- **\*\*:20: (Documentary Credit Number):\*\*** Map from \`11_limit_credit_line\`.

\- **\*\*:31C: (Date of Issue):\*\*** Map from \`17_effective_date\` (Format: YYMMDD).

\- **\*\*:40A: (Form of Documentary Credit):\*\*** Determine using \`23_transferable\`. If "Yes", output "IRREVOCABLE TRANSFERABLE". If "No", output "IRREVOCABLE".

\- **\*\*:31D: (Date and Place of Expiry):\*\*** Combine \`18_expiry_date\` (Format: YYMMDD), \`21_expiry_place\`, and \`20_expiry_country\` on one line.

\- **\*\*:50: (Applicant):\*\*** Combine \`1_applicant_party_code_app\` and \`2_applicant_address\`. (Max 4 lines, 35 chars per line).

\- **\*\*:59: (Beneficiary):\*\*** Combine \`3_beneficiary_party_code_bne\`, \`4_beneficiary_name\`, \`5_beneficiary_address\`, and \`19_country\`. (Max 4 lines, 35 chars per line).

\- **\*\*:32B: (Currency Code, Amount):\*\*** Combine \`12_currency\` and \`13_lc_amount\`.

\- **\*\*:39A: (Percentage Credit Amount Tolerance):\*\*** Map from \`15_plus_minus_percent\` and \`16_quantity_vary_percent\` (e.g., if both are 5, output \`5/5\`). Ignore \`14_amount_terms_tolerance\` if it is just a descriptive duplicate.

\- **\*\*:41A/D: (Available With... By...):\*\*** Combine \`28_available_with\` and \`29_settlement_method\`.

\- **\*\*:42C: (Drafts at...):\*\*** Combine \`24_tenor_data_type\`, \`25_tenor_days\`, \`26_draft_start_event\`, and \`27_due_date\` into a coherent sentence.

\- **\*\*:42A/D: (Drawee):\*\*** Map from \`30_draft_drawn_on\`.

\- **\*\*:43P: (Partial Shipments):\*\*** Map from \`33_partial_shipment_43P\`.

\- **\*\*:43T: (Transhipment):\*\*** Map from \`34_transhipment_43T\`.

\- **\*\*:44A: (Place of Taking in Charge):\*\*** Map from \`35_place_of_taking_in_charge_44A\`.

\- **\*\*:44E: (Port of Loading):\*\*** Map from \`36_port_of_loading_44E\`.

\- **\*\*:44F: (Port of Discharge):\*\*** Map from \`37_port_of_discharge_44F\`.

\- **\*\*:44B: (Place of Final Destination):\*\*** Map from \`38_place_of_final_destination_44B\`.

\- **\*\*:44C: (Latest Date of Shipment):\*\*** Map from \`39_latest_shipment_date\` (Format: YYMMDD).

\- **\*\*:45A: (Description of Goods):\*\*** Combine \`40_goods_description_gdesc\`, \`31_incoterms\`, and \`32_transportation_type\`. (Wrap at 65 chars per line).

\- **\*\*:46A: (Documents Required):\*\*** Map from \`41_required_documents_01W08\`. (Wrap at 65 chars per line).

\- **\*\*:47A: (Additional Conditions):\*\*** Map from \`42_additional_conditions_01W11\`. (Wrap at 65 chars per line).

\- **\*\*:71D: (Charges):\*\*** Combine information from \`44_confirm_charges_paid_by\`, \`45_reimb_bank_charges_paid_by\`, and \`46_all_bank_charges_01W12\`.

\- **\*\*:48: (Period for Presentation):\*\*** Map from \`43_period_for_presentation_days\` (e.g., append " DAYS" if it is just a number).

\- **\*\*:49: (Confirmation Instructions):\*\*** Map from \`22_confirm_status\`.

\- **\*\*:53A/D: (Reimbursing Bank):\*\*** Map from \`10_reimbursing_bank_rmb\`.

\- **\*\*:57A/D: (Advise Through Bank):\*\*** Combine \`6_advising_bank_adv\`, \`7_advising_through_bank_adt_id\`, \`8_advising_through_bank_name\`, and \`9_advising_through_bank_address\`.

**\*\*Begin Raw MT700 Output Below:\*\***

agentNode.instruction:
```
You are an expert AI data extraction assistant specializing in Trade Finance and Letter of Credit (LC) document contents.  Your task is to analyze the provided documents, including:

1. Application for Issuance of Documentary Credit

2. Attachment Sheet

3. Proforma Invoice (PI)

4. Purchase Order (PO)

5. Sales Contract (SC)

6. Trust Receipt Form (TR)

7. Quotation

Then extract 46 specific data fields of each document.

**Input:** Read attachment from  

```

${when_an_email_is_received.AttachmentIds} ${when_an_email_is_received.AttachmentPath}

Each attachment can have single document, or multiple documents as pages in the same files.

\*\*Extraction rules:\*\*

\*\*1. Strict Mapping:\*\* Map the data found in the document to the corresponding JSON keys provided in the schema below.

\*\*2. Missing Fields:\*\* If a field is not present or cannot be found in the document, return its value as \`null\`. Do not invent, guess, or substitute values.

\*\*3. Complex Text Blocks:\*\* For text-heavy fields (like Goods Description, Required Documents, and Additional Conditions), preserve the line breaks and structure exactly as they appear in the source text.

\*\*4. Data Formatting:\*\*

\\- Extract currencies and amounts as clean text (e.g., "USD", "150000.00").

\\- Extract dates in the format they appear, or standardize to YYYY-MM-DD if requested.

\*\*5. Output Format:\*\* Return ONLY a valid JSON object matching the schema below. Do not wrap it in markdown code fences unless explicitly asked, and do not include any conversational preamble or postscript.

\*\*Output JSON:\*\*

List of documents extracted as object (document_type, and content dict of data fields).

Example:

\`\`\`

\[

  { 

     "document_type" : "LC application form", 

     "content" : {

  "1_applicant_party_code_app": "Applicant Party Code / ID / Name",\\

  "2_applicant_address": "Applicant address lines 1, 2, 3 combined or separated",\\

  "3_beneficiary_party_code_bne": "Beneficiary Party Code / ID",\\

  "4_beneficiary_name": "Beneficiary name",\\

  "5_beneficiary_address": "Beneficiary address lines 1, 2, 3",\\

  "6_advising_bank_adv": "Advising Bank Party Code / ID / Name / Address",\\

  "7_advising_through_bank_adt_id": "Advising Through Bank ID",\\

  "8_advising_through_bank_name": "Advising Through Bank Name",\\

  "9_advising_through_bank_address": "Advising Through Bank Address",\\

  "10_reimbursing_bank_rmb": "Reimbursing Bank Party Code / ID / Name / Address",\\

  "11_limit_credit_line": "Credit Line number",\\

  "12_currency": "Currency of LC/DLC",\\

  "13_lc_amount": "Amount of LC/DLC",\\

  "14_amount_terms_tolerance": "Tolerance Amount description/terms",\\

  "15_plus_minus_percent": "Tolerance plus/minus percentage",\\

  "16_quantity_vary_percent": "Tolerance Goods Quantity percentage",\\

  "17_effective_date": "LC/DLC Issuance Date",\\

  "18_expiry_date": "Expiry Date",\\

  "19_country": "Beneficiary Country",\\

  "20_expiry_country": "Expiry Country",\\

  "21_expiry_place": "Expiry Place",\\

  "22_confirm_status": "Confirmation instructions (Without, May Add, Confirm)",\\

  "23_transferable": "LC/DLC Transferable status (Yes/No or True/False)",\\

  "24_tenor_data_type": "Terms of Payment (Time, Sight, Mixed)",\\

  "25_tenor_days": "LC Time, Tenor Days",\\

  "26_draft_start_event": "LC Time, Start Event Date / Draft details",\\

  "27_due_date": "LC Time, Due Date",\\

  "28_available_with": "The bank with which the LC is available for presentation",\\

  "29_settlement_method": "The method of settlement under the LC",\\

  "30_draft_drawn_on": "The bank on which the draft is to be drawn",\\

  "31_incoterms": "Trade Terms / Incoterms",\\

  "32_transportation_type": "Transportation Type",\\

  "33_partial_shipment_43P": "Partial Shipment terms",\\

  "34_transhipment_43T": "Transhipment terms",\\

  "35_place_of_taking_in_charge_44A": "Place of Taking in Charge/Dispatch from.../Place of Receipt",\\

  "36_port_of_loading_44E": "Port of Loading/Airport of Departure",\\

  "37_port_of_discharge_44F": "Port of Discharge/Airport of Destination",\\

  "38_place_of_final_destination_44B": "Place of Final Destination/For Transportation To.../Place of Delivery",\\

  "39_latest_shipment_date": "Shipment Date (Latest Date of Shipment)",\\

  "40_goods_description_gdesc": "Goods Description text block",\\

  "41_required_documents_01W08": "Required Documents text block",\\

  "42_additional_conditions_01W11": "Additional Conditions text block",\\

  "43_period_for_presentation_days": "Period for Presentation in Days",\\

  "44_confirm_charges_paid_by": "Confirmation Charges Paid by",\\

  "45_reimb_bank_charges_paid_by": "Reimbursement Bank Charges Paid by",\\

  "46_all_bank_charges_01W12": "All Bank Charges under LC / Special Paragraph ID '01W12'"\\

}

},

{ 

   "document_type" : "attachment", 

   "content" : {

...

},

...

\]

\`\`\`
